productDisplayName: Nike Men Cricket Navy Blue Cap
description: It's time to cheer every victory of Team India, so do it in style with this cap from nike. Bleed blue and cheer the ICC champs for every run they score and every wicket they take: do it in style for Team India wins in style too! Circumference: 57 cm Made of 100% cotton Evelets on the crown for ventilation Adjustable back strap with a buckle for a customised Fit Embroidered cricket logo with nike swoosh on the front of the crown, and an embroidered swoosh on the right Curved visor to protect the face from the glare of the sun Care Hand wash in warm water and line dry Do not dry clean, bleach, wring or iron
